title: The impact of the rising cost of living on disabled people in the UK
body: "In 2023, the Disability Unit (DU) commissioned the Research Institute for Disabled Consumers (RiDC) to develop research to understand the impact of rises in the cost of living on the lives of disabled people in the UK.   The research focused on:   affordability of food, shopping essentials and utility bills, including energy physical and mental health and independence access and use of medical aids, health services and personal care living conditions, family life and access to community access to financial services, government support and employment access to products and services in general  "
